attacking_style: Launches early, aggressive moves that force immediate peloton reactions, particularly on technical or unpredictable terrain where solo breaks carry genuine threat.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactical patterns across different team contexts.
terrain_preference: Thrives on courses where breakaways hold intrinsic value (technical parcours, gravel sectors). Less effective on pure sprint stages where break currency is devalued.
vulnerability: On straightforward sprint stages, his attacks are neutralized by peloton's willingness to concede large time gaps, indicating limited threat when outcome is predetermined.
key_patterns: Early aggression strategy: initiates moves well before finale (2 observations)
Break threat credibility varies by course profile: dangerous on technical terrain, neutralized on sprint stages (2 observations)
form_trajectory: unknown: observations span 3-year gap (2019-2022) with insufficient recent data to assess current trajectory
